title: Scalability and High Availability
description: Key commands and patterns for scalable and highly available systems.

commands.description: Set up an Nginx load balancer
commands.scenario: Set up an Nginx load balancer

commands.command:
frontend http_front
    bind *:80
    default_backend servers

backend servers
    balance roundrobin
    server server1 192.168.1.1:80 check
    server server2 192.168.1.2:80 check
commands.description: Configure round-robin load balancing in HAProxy
commands.scenario: Configure round-robin load balancing in HAProxy

commands.command:
CHANGE MASTER TO
  MASTER_HOST='master_host_name',
  MASTER_USER='replication_user_name',
  MASTER_PASSWORD='replication_password',
  MASTER_LOG_FILE='recorded_log_name',
  MASTER_LOG_POS=recorded_log_position;

commands.description: Add a read replica in AWS RDS
commands.scenario: Add a read replica in AWS RDS

commands.description: Set up Redis caching in Node.js
commands.scenario: Set up Redis caching in Node.js

commands.command:
import memcache

mc = memcache.Client(['127.0.0.1:11211'], debug=0)
mc.set('key', 'value')

aws autoscaling create-auto-scaling-group --auto-scaling-group-name my-asg --launch-configuration-name my-launch-config --min-size 1 --max-size 5 --desired-capacity 2 --vpc-zone-identifier subnet-12345678
commands.description: Create an AWS Auto Scaling group
commands.scenario: Create an AWS Auto Scaling group

commands.command: gcloud compute instance-groups managed set-autoscaling my-group --max-num-replicas 10 --target-cpu-utilization 0.6
commands.description: Set up Google Cloud auto scaling
commands.scenario: Set up Google Cloud auto scaling

commands.command: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --alarm-name HighCPUUtilization --metric-name CPUUtilization --namespace AWS/EC2 --statistic Average --period 300 --threshold 70 --comparison-operator GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold --dimensions Name=InstanceId,Value=i-1234567890abcdef0 --evaluation-periods 2 --alarm-actions arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:my-sns-topic
commands.description: Set up a CloudWatch alarm for CPU usage
commands.scenario: Set up a CloudWatch alarm for CPU usage

commands.command:
global:
  scrape_interval: 15s

scrape_configs:
  - job_name: 'prometheus'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['localhost:9090']

commands.description: Set up Grafana dashboard for visualization
commands.scenario: Set up Grafana dashboard for visualization
